title: [cross-impl] EDHOC transcript hash divergence
description: Rust (edhoc.rs:415-422: G_Y || H(msg1)), C (edhoc.c:750-764: H(msg1)||G_Y||C_R), Python differ on TH_2/TH_3/TH_4 computation. Breaks PRK chain, MACs, signatures, OSCORE export. See explore report for full details + test/vectors/edhoc.json mismatch. Recent uk36/ow3c/hnyw fixes did not align. Must match spec + Python oracle.
